name: First Aid
description: deftly seeing to others’ hurts, the skill of practical medicinal actions

name: Animal Handling
description: understanding and being understood by animals, and riding them.

name: Art
description: playing music, singing, performing, painting

name: Charm
description: proper etiquette, pleasing performance, schmoozing etc.

name: Crafting
description: the act of making objects

name: Deception
description: your ability to lie, apply and wear disguises, impersonate etc.

name: Search
description: the act of investigation, spotting things hidden, as well as researching texts

name: Insight
description: reading people and discerning lies and motives

name: Intimidation
description: the art of browbeating

name: Knowledge
description: a kind of learning. When taking this skill, choose one like: Alchemy / Arcana / Culture / Engineering / History / Medicine / Nature / Occult / Religion. You can take multiple different instances of Knowledge.

name: Logic
description: skill of applying logical thinking and such philosophy, as well as Strategy and Tactics, and piecing together evidence

name: Persuasion
description: the skills of turning people around to your point of view

name: Piloting
description: your ability to drive carts, sail boats and navigate a map

name: Subterfuge
description: Skill in the arts of subtler crime: forgery, lockpicking, spying etc.

name: Stealth
description: The ability to hide and remain unnoticed, and construct camouflage.

name: Wilderness
description: your ability to survive the wild, including navigation, tracking, finding sustenance and shelter. Interacting with the natural world

name: Blocking
description: The ability to intercept strikes without harm

name: Bludgeoning
description: The skill of being particularly effective at beating people (and other targets) with sticks.

name: Bowyer
description: The ability to draw and fire a bow quickly and accurately.

name: Duelling
description: The skill-at-arms for various technical weapons like swords, tridents and war-axes.

name: Firearms
description: The knowledge and skill of using and maintaining firearms.

name: Scrapping
description: The ability to fight with hands, feet, knives and improvised weaponry.

name: Spear Fighting
description: Your aptness with a stick.

name: Throwing
description: Skill at throwing items accurately and powerfully
